name: co.thinair/data
description: The only MCP database server for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server in one session. 23 dialect-aware tools across 4 tiers: schema introspection, cross-database compare, query firewall, anomaly detection, PII scanning, N+1 detection, EXPLAIN/optimization, query history. Read-only enforced at three independent layers (SQL guard, session READ ONLY, optional per-connection custom firewall). OAuth 2.1 (keyless) or API key auth. Database connections are added per-tenant via the `add_connection` tool *after* sign-in — not at install time. Globally edge-deployed for low latency.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional. Most clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) complete OAuth at first use — no token paste required. For non-OAuth clients, paste `Bearer ta_live_...`; get a key at https://data.thinair.co/connect. Database connections are added per-tenant via the `add_connection` MCP tool *after* sign-in — never as an env var or at install time.
